name: Engineering Project Report
description: Standard blueprint for final year engineering project reports. Includes certificate, declaration, acknowledgement, abstract, TOC, list of figures, list of tables, multiple technical chapters, references, and appendices.

sections.heading: Cover Page
sections.content_hint: Project title, author name, institution, date

sections.heading: Certificate
sections.content_hint: Certificate of approval from supervisor and head of department

sections.heading: Acknowledgement
sections.content_hint: Acknowledgements to supervisor, department, family, and friends

sections.heading: Abstract
sections.content_hint: Brief summary of the project, objectives, methodology, key findings

sections.heading: Chapters
sections.content_hint: Main technical chapters of the project report

sections.heading: References
sections.content_hint: List of references cited in the report in IEEE format

sections.heading: Appendices
sections.content_hint: Supplementary material, code listings, detailed data
